traceability.verbatim_text_quote: We will not move forward with pure researchers

semantic_targets.business_intent: To build a new AI Engineering org for a talent intelligence platform
semantic_targets.primary_persona: A senior AI engineer with a scrappy product-engineering attitude and deep technical depth in modern ML systems
anti_personas: A senior engineer who has spent their career bouncing between early-stage startups
A senior engineer who has spent their career in pure research environments
A senior engineer who has moved into 'architecture' or 'tech lead' roles
A senior engineer who hasn't written production code in the last 18 months
A title-chaser who optimizes for 'Senior' → 'Staff' → 'Principal' titles
A framework enthusiast who writes a lot of LangChain tutorials and blog posts
A senior engineer who has only worked at consulting firms for their entire career
A senior engineer whose primary expertise is computer vision, speech, or robotics without significant NLP/IR exposure
A senior engineer whose work has been entirely on closed-source proprietary systems for 5+ years without external validation
